title: Better Copper Recipes
description: Copper recipes that actually make sense
body:
# Better Copper Recipes

**Better Copper Recipes datapack adds 3 new (better) recipes to the game.** This mod does not change vanilla game, it only **adds** three new crafting recipes. You can still use the regular crafting recipes if you choose to.


## Copper Trapdoor Recipe

![Copper Trapdoor Recipe](https://i.ibb.co/M727S3C/image.png)

**Do we really need 54 ingots to craft 2 trapdoors Mojang?**


## Copper Door Recipe

![Copper Door Recipe](https://i.ibb.co/sHr5BGb/image.png)

**Just make it make sense.**


## Copper Bulb Recipe

![Copper Bulb Recipe](https://i.ibb.co/FJRHJ8D/image.png)

**A blaze rod? Seriously?**
